section_miscategorizations.reason: This is an objective lab result and should be documented under Objective rather than repeated in the Assessment.
This is an objective lab value and belongs in the Objective section, not in the Assessment.

section_miscategorizations.text: The doctor orders a hemoglobin a1c.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Content is correctly in the Plan, but the note already documents a hemoglobin A1c result in Objective; without clarification that this is a future follow-up lab, this can be confusing. However, it is still fundamentally a plan/order, so this is only a minor organizational concern.
